_principle: A learner enters the spiral only after demonstrating stable control of form; the spiral deepens meaning, not grammar.
whatTheSpiralIs: Reuse of existing LinguisticTargets across new destinations
Increased contextual, social, and cognitive depth
whatTheSpiralIsNot: New Activity creation (reuses existing Activity IDs)
Remediation (that is handled by adaptivity rules)

entryPreconditions._note: ALL conditions must be true. If any fails, learner stays in linear progression.

destinationCoverage.example: For A2 spiral entry: dest1–dest18 completed

triggers: A new LinguisticTarget is required by the next CEFR level
The narrative arc closes (destination sequence ends)
exitCondition.note: Spirals are finite. They deepen, they do not loop.
